title: Boarding at Scanderoon
description: Six Venetian galleys surround the Eagle. Your culverins are hot, and the boarding axes are out. It is a matter of steel and scholarship now.

choices.consequence: Heal your crew instantly via historical resonance.
Demand the Venetian's surrender of his alchemical logs.

title: The Caverns of Milos
description: Amidst the volcanic vents, you find a residue of 'Philosophic Mercury' and a local scholar who knows its use. But the Venetian spies are watching the port.

choices.consequence: Gain 5 Mercury, but your Stigma increases by 20.
Gain the 'Secret of Fixation' letter, but no raw materials.

title: Intercepted by the Serene
description: A Venetian Galley has overtaken the 'Eagle'. They demand a search of your hold and an explanation for your 'suspicious' experiments at Milos.

choices.consequence: Lose 100 Wealth but maintain your secrets.

choices.text: Defend your right as an English Privateer
choices.consequence: Gain Honor but the Venetian fleet gains speed.
